judgment.summary: Fast-growing software company with strong free cash flow but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 31.0%; next earnings date is 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 31.7% YoY — indicating strong top-line expansion.
Analyst growth est, current FY 49.6% — high expected future growth.
Gross margin 84.8% — very high for a software business.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.44B — strong cash generation despite GAAP losses.
Consensus buy rating from 31 analysts with a high mean target.
negatives: Operating margin -2.0% and Profit margin -3.5% — currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
Return on equity -19.3% and Return on assets -1.9% — negative returns.
Current ratio 0.70 and Quick ratio 0.61 — liquidity could be a concern.
Forward P/E 13.90 — valuation is high relative to current profitability.

news.paragraph: A headline indicates a potential partnership involving Scion Group and Ares Management in student housing, but this news does not appear to be directly related to Atlassian Corporation (TEAM). Traders should focus on company-specific catalysts and fundamentals rather than this unrelated news item.

headlines.title: Scion Group & Ares Management Team Up to Buy $910M in Student Housing

examples.body: $TEAM Bought a few shares on the dip. Average is looking better by the day.
